case_title: ZARICH PAINTING & DECORATING CO. VS. MARK MILLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF ZARICH PAINTING & DECORATING CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ENNIO ZARICH, OWNER. DEFENDANT MARK MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN MOI IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT KAREN MOI. KAREN MOI WAIVES HER RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY ZARICH PAINTING & DECORATING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, MARK MOI, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 SERVED FEB-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, MARK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZARICH PAINTING & DECORATING CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZARICH PAINTING & DECORATING CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILLER, MARK MOI, KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
